response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools and testing infrastructure, and a proven track record in leadership and open-source contributions, but lacks explicit evidence of people management experience beyond technical mentorship and lacks mobile platform focus, which are key for this role.
strengths: Extensive experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators) and testing infrastructure.
Proven technical leadership through open-source projects, workshops, and cross-team collaboration.
Broad stack expertise across mobile, web, and embedded systems with hands-on coding in relevant languages.
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience beyond technical roles.
Mobile platform experience is limited to a single iOS app takeover, not systemic mobile ecosystem leadership.
Resume contains inconsistent employment dates (e.g., Google starting in 2025, Amazon ongoing since 2016).
